step_rationale: Lymphatic endothelial cell marker; identifies lymphatic infiltrate in thrombus composition.
mechanism: D2-40/podoplanin marks lymphatic endothelial involvement in coronary thrombus architecture.

references.title: Functions and Regeneration of Mature Cardiac Lymphatic Vessels in Atherosclerosis, Myocardial Infarction, and Heart Failure.
Co-expression of vascular and lymphatic endothelial cell markers on early endothelial cells present in aspirated coronary thrombi from patients with ST-elevation myocardial infarction.
